name: Too Tired To Die
short_description: Too Tired To Die is a rapid-paced PvP, Vampire Survivors-like game. One fateful day, a cola delivery was mixed up with one for Forgetfulness Tea... All employees who sipped the netherworld beverage lost their souls, drifting into the River of the Dead.
detailed_description:
Extra


About the Game

The average human life expectancy soared ever higher: not good for business in the Underworld. And so, it shifted to focus on package delivery services instead. Business boomed, until a fateful incident that saw a cola delivery get mixed up with one for Lady Meng's Forgetfulness Tea... All employees who sipped the netherworld beverage lost their souls, drifting into the River of the Dead. The influx was too much for the Underworld to handle. Deliveries lagged behind schedule, stolen left right and center by ne'er-do-well spirits, while the former employees had all lost their memories. Help would not arrive: they could only dig through the piles of packages themselves in hope of finding their lost souls.

You, one such employee, may well have to fight against your own soulless colleagues as well as those wicked souls stealing deliveries.

Extending as far as the eye can see are ghoulish beings and monstrous creatures of all kinds. Slay them to build Honor, and spend it to draw a range of mighty magical powers. We prepared: 

  • 26 Primary Skills

  • 13 Secondary Skills

  • 55 Passives

Many a mystical figure resides deep in the Underworld. Retrieve items for them, and they might just lend you their aid. Though your memories may be lost, your duty remains: survive to be the last one standing!

Utilize a wide array of Omens to keep foes reeling. Seek out good Omens, and cast bad Omens aside!

On the way to work, the underworld has managed relationships and selected 15 Underworld Omens for you. But everything has a price, and "relationships" are not given in vain. Each time you upgrade, you will receive "three good things and one bad thing." Used wisely, even a weaker Omen can turn the tides completely.

Not feeling these new memories? Want to switch classes? Not to worry: Lady Meng of the Underworld has prepared you a fresh batch of her Forgetfulness Tea.

Take a sip, and take on a new role—work hard, and good luck out there!

The Underworld battlefield can be a lot to take in. If you're struggling, check out the Omenopedia for details on each Omen's effects. Know your Omens, know the enemy as you know yourself, and you're sure to go far.
